Curated palettes and exportable design tokens.

All Themes
Aa
Aa
Crimson Horizon
A high-impact palette built around blazing crimson with paired light and dark surfaces. Toggle modes above to preview how accents, typography, and components adapt across contexts.
Aa
Aa
Nordic Frost
A calm, highly readable palette inspired by Nordic winter hues, perfect for developers, documentation portals, and complex dashboard interfaces.
Aa
Aa
Solar Flare
Vibrant and warm, Solar Flare pairs heavy-weight expressionist headers with glowing solar accents. Excellent for tech startups, product sites, and campaigns.
Aa
Aa
Emerald Grove
A organic and luxurious theme featuring deep pine green tones and soft sage backgrounds. The serif typography makes it perfect for boutique brands, literary journals, and design studios.
Aa
Aa
Neon Cyber
An energetic design built around glowing magenta and cyan accents, retro-wave grids, and monospaced number overlays. Excellent for tech projects, gaming portals, and digital art studios.
Aa
Aa
Desert Dunes
Rich sandstone, terracotta, and warm clay tones. Desert Dunes blends natural, cozy earthiness with sleek modern type lines, ideally suited for architectural studios and natural products.
Aa
Aa
Ocean Abyss
Deep marine indigos highlighted by glowing bioluminescent cyan and ice-blue tones. Create immersive, smooth, fluid user interfaces representing raw marine intelligence.
Aa
Aa
Brutalist Concrete
A high-contrast monochrome canvas broken by warning-tape yellow highlights. Features rigid borders, blocky hard-shadow offsets, and industrial monospaced lettering.
Aa
Aa
Vintage Parchment
Inspired by historic books, classical text settings, and literary magazines. This design captures warm paper fibers, faded sepia ink, and classic high-contrast serif details.
Aa
Aa
Sakura Bloom
Vivid pinks layered with deep, charcoal-plum fields. Bringing a fresh, creative, high-contrast feminine voice to modern apps and digital spaces.
Aa
Aa
Obsidian Gold
A luxurious theme featuring polished gold metal highlights against obsidian dark surfaces. Tailored for luxury hotels, high fashion houses, and bespoke brand platforms.
Aa
Aa
Monochrome Swiss
A highly disciplined system following iconic Swiss design and Bauhaus principles. Uses strict neutral backgrounds with high-contrast red accents.
Aa
Aa
Retro Arcade
Glowing pink and lime neon accents on synthwave purple fields. Features pixel-art styling, blocky grid outlines, and high-energy 80s arcade vibes.
Aa
Aa
Matcha Latte
Soft herbal matcha greens paired with warm cream, milk, and oat colors. Delivers a highly comforting, cozy visual workspace ideal for organic lifestyle applications.
Aa
Aa
Steel Foundry
Industrious iron and steel slates accented by forge-spark orange highlights. A heavy-duty, high-performance look optimized for monitoring hubs and heavy machinery software.
Aa
Aa
Orchid Nebula
Vibrant space orchid violet and stardust pink highlights. Creates high-end immersive web experiences with deep orbital gradients and sleek futuristic display lines.
Aa
Aa
Sunset Glow
Dusk purples and sunset pinks merge to create a high-contrast editorial sunset landscape. Beautiful serif headings set a poetic, luxury tone.
Aa
Aa
Sage Minimalist
Calming sage-infused slate surfaces and desaturated greys. Sage Minimalist is engineered for pure reading experience, zero distraction, and editorial authority.
Aa
Aa
Royal Velvet
Regal indigo velvet surfaces offset by polished royal gold. Ideal for high-end boutique storefronts, creative agencies, and portfolio showcases.
Aa
Aa
Copper Mine
Vibrant turquoise verdigris accents on dark, warm metallic copper surfaces. An industrial and organic crossover that feels highly tactile and premium.
Aa
Aa
Cyberpunk Grid
Vibrant hazardous yellow and toxic neon accents on flat carbon sheets. Cyberpunk Grid uses heavy rigid outlines, monospaced tech specifications, and high-impact headlines.
Aa
Aa
Icelandic Geyser
Freezing water blue highlights on warm volcanic ash and steam grey backgrounds. High-contrast typography pairs delicate serif headlines with technical body layouts.
Aa
Aa
Terracotta Garden
Muted clay terracotta highlights on desaturated olive green and warm stone backgrounds. Replicates Mediterranean rustic spaces for organic, lifestyle, or architectural journals.
Aa
Aa
Electric Lavender
Playful electric lavender and lilac highlights on stone-dark minimal backgrounds. A trendy, high-contrast, high-energy layout perfect for digital creators and modern portfolios.
Aa
Aa
Arctic Teal
A split-complementary palette built from deep teal with warm amber accents. Surfaces are tinted from the teal family — never pure grey. Toggle modes above to preview how the glacial surfaces and accent hierarchy adapt across contexts.
Aa
Aa
Volcanic Ember
A monochromatic warm palette built from burnt sienna and fire orange. Every surface is tinted from the ember family — dark modes use charred earth tones, not pure black.
Aa
Aa
Midnight Indigo
An analogous cool palette built from deep indigo and violet. Surfaces use dark blue-purple tones that feel like a midnight sky — immersive and authoritative.
Aa
Aa
Copper Sun
A complementary warm palette built from deep copper and polished gold. Surfaces use rich amber-brown tones that evoke burnished metal and golden hour light.
Aa
Aa
Glacial Moss
An analogous cool-green palette built from deep forest moss and fresh spring growth. Surfaces use natural green-blacks that feel rooted in the earth.
Aa
Aa
Coral Reef
A split-complementary palette built from warm coral with deep rose and blush surfaces. The interplay of warm reds creates a living, vibrant atmosphere with organic depth.
Aa
Aa
Citrus Punch
A highly punchy design theme combining crisp lime green accents with glowing yellow details. Built for energetic web products and tech startups looking to stand out.
Aa
Aa
Midnight Spruce
A luxurious, moody palette matching deep pine green forest backgrounds with brushed amber-gold accents and classic roman serif headers. Ideal for upscale lifestyle brands, boutiques, and architectural firms.
Aa
Aa
Cyber Sunset
A high-key synthwave palette showing off electric violet magenta and hot pink accents over deep grape purple foundations. Designed for creative portfolios, festivals, and music interfaces.
Aa
Aa
Pistachio Cream
A warm botanical theme with soft pistachio and sage cream colors. Pairs modern Jakarta sans layouts with elegant editorial roman serifs for organic bakeries, lifestyle blogs, and design portfolios.
Aa
Aa
Bordeaux Velvet
A luxurious wine-red theme utilizing deep velvet crimson backgrounds with champagne gold highlights and roman headers. Tailored for creative writing, upscale culinary spaces, and boutique galleries.
Aa
Aa
Cobalt Tech
A technical UI theme pairing electric cobalt blue and cyan accents over clean slate and ice blue backgrounds. Uses Fira Code for structured tabular data, metrics, and developer tools.
Aa
Aa
Sandstone Studio
A warm, architectural design template featuring raw sandstone neutral backgrounds and warm rust orange highlights. Clean structural styling designed for ceramics, architecture, and minimal studios.
Aa
Aa
Orchid Dusk
A warm purple theme matching soft lilac drop surfaces with rich orchid violet and warm pink accents. Built with elegant serif headings and soft, rounded forms for boutique portfolios.
Aa
Aa
Charcoal Brass
A stark industrial theme pairing raw slate charcoal backgrounds with warm brushed brass-gold accents. Heavy block grids and typewriter spacing make it ideal for architectural blueprints, craft workshops, and developer reports.
Aa
Aa
Glacier Melt
A crisp, fresh tech theme utilizing ice floe blue backgrounds with freezing teal and cyan highlights. Developed for green energy dashboards, climate platforms, and minimalist analytics interfaces.
Aa
Aa
Plum Noir
A sophisticated editorial theme built on deep plum and warm magenta tones. High-contrast display serifs paired with clean geometric body text create a premium aesthetic for magazines, design studios, and fashion journals.
Aa
Aa
Amber Woods
A warm heritage theme marrying deep forest greens with rich honey-amber accents and delicate editorial Garamond typography. Specially constructed for craft breweries, outdoor getaways, and artisanal brands.
Aa
Aa
Cobalt Amber
A colorblind-friendly theme optimized for red-green vision differences. Using high-contrast cobalt blue and amber gold, it offers exceptional readability and visual clarity.
Aa
Aa
Tritan Horizon
A colorblind-friendly design optimized for blue-yellow vision differences (Tritanopia). Crimson and cyan accents combine to provide clear, high-contrast visibility.
Aa
Aa
Noir Minimalist
A pure grayscale monochromatic theme stripped of colored accents. Leveraging absolute contrast between whites, silvers, and charcoal blacks, it focuses purely on raw typography.
Aa
Aa
Golden Aura Editorial
A clean, high-precision layout celebrating warm paper-colored backdrops, rich gold-leaf highlight rules, and classic serif-driven typography hierarchies. Perfect for professional resumes, studios, and journals.
Aa
Aa
Aurablox Tech
A bold high-precision theme optimized for outcome-based strategy portfolios and AI engineering portals. Strict, blocky grid structures paired with glowing hot-amber indicators and monospace highlights.
Aa
Aa
Kyoto Moss Gardens
A quiet, highly disciplined layout inspired by Kyoto zen gardens. Gentle moss greens, tatami straw undertones, and structured stone grid frames foster meditative, highly readable layouts.
Aa
Aa
Vintage Polaroid
A warm analogue theme recalling faded photographs and typewriter notes. Built around thick flat-shadowed frames, soft sepia ink, and classic slab-serif display weights.
Aa
Aa
Nordic Cabin
A warm, rustic Scandi-minimalist layout marrying the deep greens of northern spruce forests with glowing pine wood accents and classic roman serif headlines.
Aa
Aa
Vaporwave Sunset
A high-impact nostalgic digital sunset theme. Built around glowing neon magenta accents, cyber cyan highlights, and bold geometric display structures.
Aa
Aa
Sahara Dust
A warm desert-inspired theme wrapping sand storm colors with golden sun highlights and high-contrast editorial typography. Gives a peaceful, organic, high-end travel portfolio feel.
Aa
Aa
Deep Oceanic Trench
A deep bioluminescent ocean theme with neon cyan borders and deep indigo slabs. Creates an immersive, underwater tech portal feel.
Aa
Aa
Monochrome Swiss Bold
An ultra-minimalist, high-impact design system inspired by classic Swiss editorial layouts. Stiff black borders, stark red highlights, and massive sans-serif type.
Aa
Aa
Tokyo Neon Alley
A high-voltage cyberpunk theme mirroring Tokyo neon streetlights. Built around rich orchid purple borders, technical radioactive green highlights, and horizontal grid alignment.
Aa
Aa
Chalkboard Editorial
A warm academic dark theme built on chalkboard slate green. Emulates manual blackboards with dusty-chalk white text, gold chalk rules, and literary typewriter copy.
Aa
Aa
Aura Quartz
A soft holographic luxury theme styled around iridescent mineral textures. Perfect for jewelry designers, holistic wellness brands, and creative fashion studios.
Aa
Aa
Espresso Editorial
A warm, rich editorial theme wrapping coffee roasted color variables with steamed milk backdrops, golden crema highlights, and bold serif displays.
Aa
Aa
Bilingual Zen
A high-precision bilingual layout inspired by Japanese ink-wash calligraphy and washi paper textures. Bold stone slate, delicate red seal highlights, and precise grid balance.
Aa
Aa
Retro Arcade Neon
A high-contrast 8-bit retro arcade theme. Emulates CRT terminals with matrix green text, scanline glows, and retro pixelated headlines.
Aa
Aa
Botanical Herbarium
A quiet, historical theme themed around dried botanical illustrations. Soft linen canvases, pressed sage leaves, walnut ink lines, and elegant editorial serifs.
Aa
Aa
Mars Colony
A high-contrast red-planet technical theme. Built around deep carbon dark mode, rusty Martian soil highlights, and high-precision telemetry monospace readouts.
Aa
Aa
Tritanopia Marine
A marine-inspired layout optimized for blue-yellow colorblindness (Tritanopia). Replaces blue-yellow boundaries with high-contrast red-cyan visual indicators.
Aa
Aa
Opaline Luxury
A high-end editorial luxury theme designed around deep emerald onyx and pearl white. Symmetrical, clean columns and roman serif typography create a premium designer portfolio tone.
Aa
Aa
Brutalist Steel Grid
A stiff, high-contrast industrial theme built on galvanized steel colors. Thick black grid boundaries, glowing warning hazard orange indicators, and raw monospace typing.
